disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A previously stable painless neck lump of about six months has rapidly enlarged over the last seven days
trigger_question_examples: How long have you had the lump and has it changed?
When did it start growing faster?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had it about six months and it never bothered me — but this past week it's suddenly got much bigger, really quickly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New hoarseness / deepening of the voice developing alongside the enlarging mass
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My voice has gone deep and gravelly over the last couple of days — it came on at the same time the lump grew.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive dysphagia to solids with a sensation of food catching / oesophageal compression
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — solid food feels like it catches or gets stuck, it's got worse over the last day or two.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness and a choking sensation when lying flat; unable to sleep supine, sitting propped forward
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you lie down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I lie flat I get short of breath and a choking feeling, so I've been propped up on pillows and can't sleep lying down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The lump is not painful despite its rapid growth
trigger_question_examples: Is the lump painful or tender?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, that's the strange thing — it doesn't hurt at all, even though it's grown so fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Childhood head and neck irradiation for a benign condition, decades ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever had radiation treatment, especially to the head or neck?
Any significant medical history from childhood?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — I had radiation to my head and neck as a child, decades ago, for something they said was benign.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no preceding sore throat or viral illness
trigger_question_examples: Any fever or recent cold or sore throat?
Have you been unwell with a viral illness before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, and I haven't been unwell with a cold or anything before this.
